news.t: ETF Prime: New Launches Surge Past 370 in 2026
Milliman Launches Healthcare Inflation ETFs (MHIG & MHIP) to Hedge the Rising Cost of U.S. Healthcare

overview.description: The Milliman Healthcare Inflation Plus ETF (MHIP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is actively managed, designed to outperform the US healthcare cost inflation rate through a multi-asset portfolio of equities, fixed income, commodities, TIPS, and Treasury bonds. The fund uses proprietary actuarial data and quantitative modeling. MHIP was launched on Apr 7, 2026 and is issued by Milliman.

data.text: Kirsten Chang, senior industry analyst at VettaFi, joined Nate Geraci on this week's ETF Prime to discuss the relentless pace of new ETF launches in 2026. The industry has launched nearly 370 new ETFs...
